predicate_mining.conclusion: No predicates meet precision threshold. Improvements come from prompt enrichment (过程信号 section), not predicate mining.

key_insight: v2 过程信号 prompt enrichment 是主要 improvement driver。dimension_agreement +18.3pp, model_agreement +20.4pp, wk_too_harsh -9。wk_too_generous +9 需要后续关注。
next_steps: Consider promoting v2 prompt format as default
Monitor wk_too_generous drift in future runs
Predicate mining may need lower precision threshold or different feature space
